composite_description: No drawdown signal. Conditions do not meet any entry threshold.
brief: Realized volatility and drawdown metrics are both improving: RV30 rose 20bp to 35% (4.7pp from the 40% threshold) and the 1yr high gap narrowed 47bp to -46.9% (11.9pp from -35% filter). A crisis entry would require z-score below -3.0; a regime flip requires BTC above the 200d MA.
